zh.lifeSummary: 當Christina Urquhart於大約1505年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪時，她的父親Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty30歲，母親Helen Abernethy29歲。她於大約1485年與Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1528年在蘇格蘭艾丁波享年24歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christina Urquhart于大约1505年出生在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪时，她的父亲Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty30岁，母亲Helen Abernethy29岁。她于大约1485年与Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1528年在苏格兰艾丁波享年24岁。

nameMeanings.name: Urquhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Ross and Cromarty): habitational name from any of various places in Scotland so called, notably the barony of Urquhart (Inverness), or places in Ross and Cromarty, Morayshire, and Fife. All are thought to derive from Pictish ar ‘on, by’ + Pictish carden ‘enclosure’ or ‘wood, copse’. Some bearers of this name trace their descent from William de Urchard, who fought for Robert the Bruce between 1297 and 1328.

variants.name: Orcutt
meanings: English (Staffordshire): perhaps a much altered form of Scottish   Urquhart  .

variants.name: Orchard
meanings: topographic or occupational name from residence near (or perhaps employment at) an orchard, Middle English orchard (Old English ortgeard, orceard).

habitational name from any of the places called Orchard. Those in Devon and Somerset are named from Old English ortgeard, orceard (a compound of wort, wyrt ‘plant’ (later associated with Latin hortus ‘garden’) + geard ‘yard, enclosure’), while East and West Orchard near Shaftesbury in Dorset derive from Primitive Welsh ar ‘beside, in front of, facing’ + ced ‘wood’.
rare variant of Scottish   Urquhart  . Compare   Orahood  .

nameMeanings.name: Christina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Simplified form of Latin Christiana, feminine form of Christianus ( see Christian ), or a Latinized form of Middle English Christin ‘Christian’ (Old English christen, from Latin).

en.lifeSummary: When Christina Urquhart was born about 1505, in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, her father, Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty, was 30 and her mother, Helen Abernethy, was 29. She married Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis about 1485, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1528, in Edinburgh, Scotland, at the age of 24.

fr.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christina Urquhart est née environ 1505, à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Helen Abernethy, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis environ 1485, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1528, à Edinburgh, Écosse, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christina Urquhart um 1505 in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty 30 und ihre Mutter Helen Abernethy 29. Sie hat um 1485 in Schottland, United Kingdom Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1528 im Alter von 24 Jahren in Edinburgh, Scotland.

Lei sposato Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis circa 1485, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1528, nel Edinburgh, Scotland, all'età di 24 anni.

ko.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Christina Urquhart(이)가 대략 1505년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen Abernethy(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1528년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christina Urquhart nasceu aproximadamente 1505, em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Helen Abernethy, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis aproximadamente 1485, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1528, em Edinburgh, Scotland, com 24 anos.

ru.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christina Urquhart родилась около 1505 г. в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Thomas Urquhart of Fischerie, Sheriff of Cromarty было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen Abernethy, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis около 1485 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1528 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия в возрасте 24 лет.

Se casó con Malcolm MacLeod, 10th of Lewis aproximadamente 1485, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1528, en Edinburgh, Scotland, a la edad de 24 años.
